---
id: audit-log-validator-versions-controller-create
title: "Create Schema"
description: "Creates a new Audit Log schema used to validate the payload of incoming Audit Log Events. If the `action` does not exist, it will also be created."
sidebar_label: "Create Schema"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Schema"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/audit_logs/actions/{actionName}/schemas"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new Audit Log schema used to validate the payload of incoming Audit Log Events. If the `action` does not exist, it will also be created.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
